templates.body:
Hi [name],

PROOF round [n] for [job_id].
Check: spelling, size, colors, placement.

Reply APPROVED to release production, or list numbered changes.
Reply by [datetime] or ship date may move.
Got changes [list]. Round [n+1] by [date]. Included in quoted scope.
Changes affect scope/price. Sending change order before round [n+1].
APPROVED logged [timestamp]. Production starts [date]. Ship target [date].

Hi [name],

Proof [ref] still needs APPROVED or changes. Production on hold.
Reply by [date] or we pause slot.
RUSH PROOF: reply by [hard_time] today or rush date forfeits.

YOU CHECK:
[ ] Names/spelling
[ ] Size/dimensions
[ ] Colors (screen variance note)
[ ] Quantity on proof matches order
INTERNAL: job [id] PROOF_HOLD until written OK. Do not run.
